agent_model.description: The model the Gemini CLI should use (e.g., gemini-2.5-pro).

evaluator_model.description: The model the test harness uses to grade the test and simulate the user (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash).

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for each CLI invocation.

env.description: A list of environment variable names required by this playbook. These will be substituted in the steps and persona context.

steps.description: The deterministic sequence of interactions between the user and the agent.

user_input.description: The simulated input provided by the user.

expected_outcome.description: The expected response or behavior from the agent to evaluate against.

persona.description: Configuration for the autonomous LLM-simulated user.

initial_user_input.description: The first input to send to the agent when starting in pure autonomous mode. Variables are interpolated.

context.description: Freeform instructions and knowledge base for the simulated user. Variables are interpolated.

max_turns.description: The maximum number of conversation turns allowed in autonomous mode before forcing a failure.

success_criteria.description: The conditions that must be met for the autonomous flow to be considered complete and successful.

llm_checks.description: Semantic checks evaluated by the LLM (e.g., 'The agent printed a final configuration summary').

flow_contains.description: Literal strings that must appear somewhere in the combined CLI stdout.

files_exist.description: A list of file paths (relative to the workspace) that must exist.

files_contain.description: A mapping of file paths to strings that must be found within them.

tool_calls_contain.description: A mapping of tool names to a list of strings that must be found within their arguments.
